description_for_human: Backs the Eurozone Analyst declarative agent with a remote MCP server.

functions.name: openCopilotStudioChat
functions.description: Always call this tool for every user message. Pass the user's text verbatim as userQuery. The tool returns a chat widget that owns the reply.

tools.name: openCopilotStudioChat
tools.title: Eurozone Analyst
tools.description: Always call this tool for every user message. Pass the user's text verbatim as userQuery. The tool returns a chat widget that owns the reply.

userQuery.description: The user's exact question, passed verbatim. The embedded analyst will treat it as the first user message in the conversation.
